---
title: "Publications"
---

::: {.publications}

## Peer-reviewed journal articles

### 2025

- **Huan Minh Tran**, Ting-Wu Chuang, Hanh Thi My Bui, … Feng-Jen Tsai (2025).
  *Global impact of climate variability and air pollution on age-standardized
  stroke mortality rates from 2000 to 2020: a country-level analysis.*
  Journal of Environmental Science and Health, Part A.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1080/10934529.2025.2607921)

- **Huan Minh Tran**, Feng-Jen Tsai, Yuan-Hung Wang, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2025).
  *Joint effects of temperature and humidity with PM2.5 on COPD.*
  BMC Public Health.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12889-025-21564-3)

- **Huan Minh Tran**, Feng-Jen Tsai, Kang-Yun Lee, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2025).
  *Corrigendum to "Extreme temperature increases the risk of COPD morbimortality:
  a systematic review and meta-analysis".* Science of the Total Environment.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2025.178996)

- **Huan Minh Tran**, Feng-Jen Tsai, Kang-Yun Lee, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2025).
  *Response to letter to the editor re: Tran et al. 2024 (Huang et al.).*
  Science of the Total Environment.

### 2024

- `[Review]` **Huan Minh Tran**, Feng-Jen Tsai, Kang-Yun Lee, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang
  (2024). *Extreme temperature increases the risk of COPD morbimortality: a
  systematic review and meta-analysis.* Science of the Total Environment.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2024.178087)

- **Huan Minh Tran**, Ching-Huang Lai, Wei-Liang Chen, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2024).
  *Effects of occupational exposure to metal fume PM2.5 on lung function and
  biomarkers among shipyard workers: a 3-year prospective cohort study.*
  International Archives of Occupational and Environmental Health.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/s00420-024-02055-1)

### 2023

- **Huan Minh Tran**, Yuan-Chien Lin, Feng-Jen Tsai, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2023).
  *Short-term mediating effects of PM2.5 on climate-associated COPD severity.*
  Science of the Total Environment.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2023.166523)

- `[Review]` **Huan Minh Tran**, Feng-Jen Tsai, Yueh-Lun Lee, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang
  (2023). *The impact of air pollution on respiratory diseases in an era of
  climate change: a review of the current evidence.*
  Science of the Total Environment.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2023.166340)

- **Huan Minh Tran**, Ting-Wu Chuang, Hsiao-Chi Chuang, Feng-Jen Tsai (2023).
  *Climate change and mortality rates of COPD and asthma: a global analysis from
  2000 to 2018.* Environmental Research.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envres.2023.116448)

- Tzu-Tao Chen, Kang-Yun Lee, Jer Hwa Chang, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2023).
  *Prediction value of neutrophil and eosinophil count at risk of COPD
  exacerbation.* Annals of Medicine.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1080/07853890.2023.2285924)

- Amja Manullang, Chi-Li Chung, Yueh-Lun Lee, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2023).
  *COPD with eosinophilic inflammation is susceptible to particulate air
  pollution exposure.* Aerosol and Air Quality Research.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.4209/aaqr.230035)

### 2022

- **Huan Minh Tran**, Tzu-Tao Chen, Yueh-Hsun Lu, … Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2022).
  *Climate-mediated air pollution associated with COPD severity.*
  Science of the Total Environment.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2022.156969)

- **Huan Minh Tran**, Hanh Thi My Bui, Somkiat Thoumsang, … Dung Tri Phung (2022).
  *Health risk assessment of volatile organic compounds exposure among nail salon
  workers in Vietnam.* Human and Ecological Risk Assessment.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1080/10807039.2022.2044285)

### 2020

- **Huan Minh Tran**, Hanh T. M. Bui, Somkiat Thoumsang, … Supat Wangwongwatana
  (2020). *Occupational symptoms due to exposure to volatile organic compounds
  among female Vietnamese nail salon workers in Danang City.*
  Journal of Occupational Health.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1002/1348-9585.12160)

- Nhan Nguyen, Duong Le Dinh, Man Nguyen Dinh Minh, … Twisuk Punpeng (2020).
  *Noise exposure and its relationship with hypertension among fishermen in Thua
  Thien Hue Province, Vietnam.* Journal of Integrated Community Health.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.24321/2319.9113.202001)

## Conference abstracts & proceedings

- **Huan Minh Tran**, Hsiao-Chi Chuang, Amja Manullang, … Kian Fan Chung (2024).
  *Increased risk of severity in COPD with eosinophilic inflammation due to air
  pollution exposure.* ERS Congress 2024 Abstracts.
  [DOI](https://doi.org/10.1183/13993003.congress-2024.pa3123)

- **Huan Minh Tran**, Lin-Yuan Chien, Feng-Jen Tsai, Hsiao-Chi Chuang (2023).
  *Effects of climate-mediated PM2.5 on lung function decline in chronic
  obstructive pulmonary disease.* ISEE Conference Abstracts.

:::
